title: Income Tax - Canada.ca
content:
What's new in income tax folios Income tax folios published within the last 12 months.
Current publications The latest version of income tax publications. Interpretations and positions contained in a current publication generally apply as of the publication date unless otherwise specified.
Cancellation of income tax publications Information about the cancellation of income tax technical publications as part of a Canada Revenue Agency initiative to remove outdated and redundant content from our website.

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
